data.description:
## Story
ab65-49f6: deliberate-violation test PR

## Goal
After the test PR (created in task 5c01-a5b8) triggers CI, verify security overlay fired and CI failed, then close the PR and delete the branch.

## Depends On
Task 5c01-a5b8 (test PR must be open first)

## Implementation

### 1. Wait for CI llm-review job to complete
```bash
PR_NUMBER=$(gh pr list --head test/ab65-49f6-deliberate-security-violation --json number --jq '.[0].number')
# Poll until llm-review check completes (up to 10 minutes)
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  STATUS=$(gh pr checks "$PR_NUMBER" --json name,state --jq '.[] | select(.name=="llm-review") | .state' 2>/dev/null || echo 'PENDING')
  [[ "$STATUS" == 'FAILURE' || "$STATUS" == 'SUCCESS' ]] && break
  sleep 10
done
```

### 2. Assert CI llm-review job FAILED
```bash
assert_eq 'FAILURE' "$STATUS"
```

### 3. Assert gh pr merge --auto is queued but not executing
```bash
MERGE_STATE=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUMBER" --json mergeStateStatus --jq '.mergeStateStatus')
# Expected: BLOCKED (required checks failing)
[[ "$MERGE_STATE" == 'BLOCKED' ]] || echo 'WARNING: expected BLOCKED merge state'
```

### 4. Close the test PR and delete the branch
```bash
gh pr close "$PR_NUMBER" --comment 'E2E verification complete. Closing test PR for story ab65-49f6.' --delete-branch
```

### 5. Verify PR is closed
```bash
STATE=$(gh pr view "$PR_NUMBER" --json state --jq '.state')
assert_eq 'CLOSED' "$STATE"
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- DD1: CI llm-review job exited non-zero (FAILURE status in gh pr checks)
- DD2: gh pr merge --auto showed BLOCKED merge state
- DD3: Test PR is in CLOSED state after close
- DD4: Branch test/ab65-49f6-deliberate-security-violation deleted from origin

## Note on reviewer-findings.json
The CI job runs in GitHub Actions and writes reviewer-findings.json as an artifact. Verify the job failed (DD1/DD2) via gh CLI. If GitHub Actions artifacts are accessible: download and verify SECURITY_OVERLAY_TRIGGERED key. If not accessible in CI context, DD1 (CI exits non-zero) is the primary observable signal.

## Testing Mode
testing_mode: GREEN
data.title: Verify security overlay triggered on test PR and close the test branch
